name: Todd Schoeff
bio: Todd leads preconstruction intelligence through detailed estimate development, scope analysis, and bid coordination that improves downstream execution. His analytical approach helps teams plan with confidence, align early with partners, and protect client expectations before work begins.
careerHighlights: Leads preconstruction intelligence for accurate scopes and reliable estimates.
Coordinates bid packages and partner alignment before field mobilization.
Improves project confidence by identifying cost and scope risks early.
Supports downstream execution through disciplined front-end planning.
funFact: Todd is driven by front-end planning that protects field teams from downstream surprises.
